channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Capcom Spotlight Announced For This Week, Here's A Teaser Trailer
item.description: Capcom's upcoming Spotlight will showcase 30 minutes of news and updates. Fans can expect exciting announcements for various platforms.

item.title: Target Just Launched New LEGO Super Mario Deals and Amazon Is Matching For Prime Day 2026
item.description: Target and Amazon are offering early LEGO Super Mario deals ahead of Prime Day. Discounts are available on various sets until June 26.

item.title: Prime Day deals are officially live: Shop the best tech sales from Apple, Sony, Bose, Anker and others for up to 54% off right now
item.description: Amazon Prime Day has launched with discounts on tech products from major brands. Members can save up to 54% on various items.

item.title: The 4 PSI Rule For Tires: What Is It, And Is It Reliable?
item.description: The 4 PSI rule helps estimate tire inflation but varies in reliability based on conditions. Understanding its limitations is crucial for drivers.

item.title: Kojima Says Only Xbox And Phil Spencer Understood OD, His New Horror Game
item.description: Hideo Kojima reveals that only Xbox and Phil Spencer grasped the concept of his horror game, OD. Other companies showed little interest.

item.title: Every Pontiac Firebird Generation Ranked By Top Speed
item.description: A ranking of all Pontiac Firebird generations based on verified top speed data. Discover which models performed best.

item.title: Sega plans shift to influencers after Sonic and Shinobi sales disappoint, despite strong reviews
item.description: Sega will pivot to influencer marketing after disappointing sales of Sonic and Shinobi games. Two new flagship titles are also on the way.

item.title: Final Fantasy VII Revelation Director Says Queer Romances Make The World Feel More Real
item.description: Director Naoki Hamaguchi emphasizes that queer relationships enhance realism in Final Fantasy VII's remake trilogy. Diversity enriches the narrative.

item.title: Chinese spaceplane releases object into orbit, according to commercial space surveillance
item.description: A Chinese spaceplane has reportedly released an object into orbit during its fourth mission, according to surveillance data. Details remain limited.

item.title: Valve is working with AMD to bring FSR 4 to the Steam Machine
item.description: Valve collaborates with AMD to enhance the Steam Machine's graphics with FSR 4 technology. This aims to improve game rendering quality.

item.title: Apple Seeds iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 Second Betas to Developers
item.description: Apple has released the second betas of iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 for developers. This follows the initial beta release two weeks ago.

item.title: Here’s how you can reserve a Steam Machine
item.description: Valve has introduced a reservation system for the Steam Machine, allowing users to sign up from June 22 to June 25.

item.title: Nintendo Is Running a Brand New Sale On Switch Games, Save $20 on These Select Titles
item.description: Amazon is offering a $20 discount on select Nintendo Switch games ahead of Prime Day. Popular titles are included in the sale.

item.title: The Elder Scrolls Online Prepares to Set Sail for Adventure with High Seas of Tamriel, Its Most Ambitious Experiment in Years
item.description: The Elder Scrolls Online is launching the High Seas of Tamriel event, marking a significant update in its seasonal approach to content.

item.title: Apple Approves Production of OLED Panels for Foldable iPhone
item.description: Apple has authorized Samsung Display to begin production of OLED panels for its upcoming foldable iPhone, signaling progress in development.
